name: Raisin Peanut Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Plump raisins by steaming. Drain and chop.
2. Roll shredded coconut into fine pieces.
3. Toast the shredded coconut in a moderate oven (370°F) until lightly browned.
4. Mix peanut butter, powdered sugar, lemon juice, cinnamon, salt, and chopped raisins in a bowl.
5. Blend thoroughly to combine all ingredients.
6. Shape the mixture into small balls.
7. Roll each ball in the toasted shredded coconut.
The Household Searchlight
